title: Forestry Commission Key Performance Indicators: Report for 2024-25
body: "Annual statistical report providing the key performance indicators (KPIs) for the Forestry Commission. This report provides updates on the Forestry Commission’s 10 headline indicators, Forestry England’s 6 headline indicators and 23 further indicators for Forest Services. Each indicator is for England as a whole at national level.  This is an Official Statistics publication. The report itself is accompanied by tables of supporting data providing the indicator statistics.  "
